name: HMS BYMS 2026 (J 826)
events: 19 Jul 1950 Re-named "Calypso" and serving as a Maltese ferry, the former HMS J826 was purchased by French explorer Jacques-Yves Cousteau and converted into the famous research vessel of the same name. http://www.newsfinder.org/site/more/jacques_yves_cousteaus_calypso/ (1)
